'''tosafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrecksome|wrecksome]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrecksome|wrecksome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tosafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tosafithi|tosafithi]] || [[word:tosafiji|tosafiji]] || [[word:tosafishi|tosafishi]] || [[word:tosafiki|tosafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tosafuthuthu|tosafuthuthu]] || [[word:tosafujuju|tosafujuju]] || [[word:tosafushushu|tosafushushu]] || [[word:tosafukuku|tosafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tosafuthu|tosafuthu]] || [[word:tosafuju|tosafuju]] || [[word:tosafushu|tosafushu]] || [[word:tosafuku|tosafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tosafufthuf|tosafufthuf]] || [[word:tosafufjuf|tosafufjuf]] || [[word:tosafufshuf|tosafufshuf]] || [[word:tosafufkuf|tosafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tosafethe|tosafethe]] || [[word:tosafeje|tosafeje]] || [[word:tosafeshe|tosafeshe]] || [[word:tosafeke|tosafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tosafothotho|tosafothotho]] || [[word:tosafojojo|tosafojojo]] || [[word:tosafoshosho|tosafoshosho]] || [[word:tosafokoko|tosafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tosafotho|tosafotho]] || [[word:tosafojo|tosafojo]] || [[word:tosafosho|tosafosho]] || [[word:tosafoko|tosafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tosafofthof|tosafofthof]] || [[word:tosafofjof|tosafofjof]] || [[word:tosafofshof|tosafofshof]] || [[word:tosafofkof|tosafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfthÃŸf|tosafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfjÃŸf|tosafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfshÃŸf|tosafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfkÃŸf|tosafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|tosafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|tosafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|tosafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|tosafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfthÃŸf|tosafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfjÃŸf|tosafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfshÃŸf|tosafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfkÃŸf|tosafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfthÃŸf|tosafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfjÃŸf|tosafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfshÃŸf|tosafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tosafÃŸfkÃŸf|tosafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tosafÃḊthÃḊ|tosafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:tosafÃḊjÃḊ|tosafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:tosafÃḊshÃḊ|tosafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:tosafÃḊkÃḊ|tosafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tosafathatha|tosafathatha]] || [[word:tosafajaja|tosafajaja]] || [[word:tosafashasha|tosafashasha]] || [[word:tosafakaka|tosafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tosafatha|tosafatha]] || [[word:tosafaja|tosafaja]] || [[word:tosafasha|tosafasha]] || [[word:tosafaka|tosafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tosafafthaf|tosafafthaf]] || [[word:tosafafjaf|tosafafjaf]] || [[word:tosafafshaf|tosafafshaf]] || [[word:tosafafkaf|tosafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tosafasha|tosafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tosafshÃḋsha|tosafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tosafrosha|tosafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tosafmusha|tosafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tosafyasha|tosafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotosafnkshÃḋsha|gotosafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotosafnkrosha|gotosafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotosafnkmusha|gotosafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotosafnkyasha|gotosafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tosasafasha|tosasafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tosasafshÃḋsha|tosasafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tosasafrosha|tosasafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tosasafmusha|tosasafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tosasafyasha|tosasafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotosasafnkshÃḋsha|gotosasafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotosasafnkrosha|gotosasafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotosasafnkmusha|gotosasafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotosasafnkyasha|gotosasafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tesÃḊfasha|tesÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tesÃḊfshÃḋsha|tesÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tesÃḊfrosha|tesÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tesÃḊfmusha|tesÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tesÃḊfyasha|tesÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotesÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gotesÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotesÃḊfnkrosha|gotesÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotesÃḊfnkmusha|gotesÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotesÃḊfnkyasha|gotesÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tosfafasha|tosfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tosfafshÃḋsha|tosfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tosfafrosha|tosfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tosfafmusha|tosfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tosfafyasha|tosfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotosfafnkshÃḋsha|gotosfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotosfafnkrosha|gotosfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotosfafnkmusha|gotosfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotosfafnkyasha|gotosfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
